ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lottery_draws" (
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lottery draw */,
  "draw_date" TEXT /* Date of the lottery draw */,
  "draw_type" TEXT /* Type of the lottery draw (e.g., EuroMillions) */,
  "total_prize_fund" TEXT /* Total prize fund allocated for this draw */,
  "rollover_amount" TEXT /* Amount carried forward to the next draw */,
  "draw_status" TEXT /* Status of the draw (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draw_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize category */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lottery draw associated with this category */,
  "numbers_matched" TEXT /* Description of the numbers matched for this prize */,
  "prize_per_winner" TEXT /* Prize amount distributed per winner */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the prize category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the prize category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_categories_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES lottery_draws ("draw_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winners" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prize category */,
  "winner_count" INTEGER /* Number of winners in this category */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the winners are from */,
  "total_prize_amount" TEXT /* Total prize amount awarded for this category */,
  "winner_names" TEXT /* Names of the winners */,
  "winner_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the winners */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES prize_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize distribution record */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lottery draw associated with this distribution */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prize category */,
  "total_prize_fund" TEXT /* Total prize fund for this distribution */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the prizes were distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_distribution_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES prize_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_distribution_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES lottery_draws ("draw_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize fund record */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lottery draw */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the prize fund */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the prize fund was allocated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_funds_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES lottery_draws ("draw_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winner associated with this transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount distributed to the winner */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the transaction (e.g., bank transfer, check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES winners ("winner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draw_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the draw associated with this result */,
  "winning_numbers" TEXT /* Winning numbers for the draw */,
  "draw_time" TEXT /* Time of the draw */,
  "jackpot_winner" INTEGER /* Whether the jackpot was won in this draw */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draw_results_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES lottery_draws ("draw_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draw_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the draw associated with this statistic */,
  "total_winners" INTEGER /* Total number of winners in this draw */,
  "total_prize_amount" TEXT /* Total amount awarded in this draw */,
  "average_prize_amount" TEXT /* Average prize amount awarded in this draw */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draw_statistics_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES lottery_draws ("draw_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winners_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winner */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prize category */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lottery draw */,
  "amount_awarded" TEXT /* Amount awarded to the winner */,
  "date_awarded" TEXT /* Date when the prize was awarded */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the prize claim (e.g., claimed, unclaimed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_history_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES winners ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_history_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES lottery_draws ("draw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_history_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES prize_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
